aiPanel.assistDescription: 🖊️ Ask the AI to create and fix slides right inside this app.
aiPanel.collabDescription: 🤝 Connect another AI you use (e.g. Claude Code) to this screen and edit the same deck together. (Advanced)
aiPanel.collapsePrompt: Collapse the instruction box (more room for preview)
aiPanel.batchHint: — Apply one instruction to each slide → review and adopt
aiPanel.promptCollapsedEcho: — The instruction box is collapsed (▸ to expand)
aiPanel.slidePromptPlaceholder: Instruction for this slide (e.g. 3 bullet points / more concise / add a diagram / add a DB node / translate to English)
aiPanel.deckPromptPlaceholder: Describe the deck you want (e.g. a 5-slide SaaS sales pitch: problem → solution → pricing → case study → next steps)
aiPanel.autoRetryNotice: The figure edit didn't come back as a partial (ops) edit, so it's being regenerated automatically as ops…
aiPanel.bestOfRunningNotice: Generating {{count}} candidates… (the adoption gate will surface the best one)

aiSettings.title: AI Settings
aiSettings.startBuiltinTitle: Start the offline built-in model (first run auto-downloads the model)
aiSettings.stopBuiltinTitle: Stop the built-in AI to free memory (auto-starts on next generation)
aiSettings.bestOfNTitle: Produce multiple candidates per generation and surface the best via the adoption gate (single-slide edit). 1 disables it. Higher means better quality but slower / more memory.

aiStatus.noValidEdit: Couldn't generate a valid edit. Try a specific instruction (e.g. summarize / format as bullets / add a diagram / translate to English).
aiStatus.apiKeyMissingHint: Enter your Anthropic API key in the settings below
aiStatus.offlineStarting: Starting offline AI… (first launch takes tens of seconds)
aiStatus.downloadFirstHint: Use the ⬇ button for the first download (about {{gb}} GB)
aiStatus.offlineAutoStartHint: It starts automatically when you generate (first launch takes tens of seconds)
aiStatus.offlineRestartHint: Restart it via “💻 Start” in the settings (or just generate to auto-start it)
aiStatus.ollamaPullHint: Pull a model with e.g. `ollama pull qwen2.5`

aiTasks.rowExpandHint: Click to view the sent prompt / result

app.draftButtonTitle: Create or import slides from a draft (text)
app.remakeAIFallback: AI not used — remade with standard layouts

applyTemplate.remakeFailedValidation: Re-make failed (the generated template did not pass validation).
applyTemplate.repairPlanHeader:
This template can't be used as-is:
{{blocks}}
applyTemplate.repairPlanProposal: Auto-repair proposal: assign types to {{total}} placeholder(s) in total ({{parts}}).

builtinRuntime.desktopOnly: The built-in model is only available in the desktop app.

collabPanel.unavailableBefore: Collaboration works only in the desktop app (
collabPanel.unavailableAfter: / built version). It starts a local MCP sidecar and connects the upstream AI and the webview to the same deck.
collabPanel.introBefore: When you start, a local MCP host (sidecar) launches. Pass the URL and token below to the upstream AI, and the AI's edits will
collabPanel.liveViewing: Connected — showing the host's deck live
collabPanel.coEditNotice: Co-editing: your edits are sent to the host (the single source of truth) and shared live with the AI. The AI's edits appear here too. Undo (⌘Z) runs against the host's history (structure changes, templates, and tab switching are locked while connected).

controller.slideEditSendFailed: Could not send the edit to the host
controller.cannotDeleteLastSlide: You can't delete the last slide (a deck needs at least one slide).

diagramEditor.mermaidIncompatibleHint: This diagram contains icons or kpi/radar and can't be converted to Mermaid. Please edit it in YAML / JSON.

diagramOverlay.moveArrowStartHint: Drag to move the arrow's start point

initModal.dialogLabel: Draft — Build slides from your draft
initModal.tidyDraftTitle: Split the raw draft into slides by heading, break up overpacked slides, and turn key-value pairs into tables (no AI, undoable)
initModal.editorHint: • You can paste or type directly here
initModal.emptyContent: Content is empty — paste or import something

llmAssist.title: ✨ Generate with AI — Build a deck from your draft
llmAssist.requestPlaceholderSlides: e.g. Progress report for a CRM migration project (about 10 slides, including current-state analysis, comparison, and a roadmap)
llmAssist.requestPlaceholderDiagram: e.g. Network diagram for a 3-tier web app (LB→Web→App→DB, with a DMZ)
llmAssist.useBuiltinTitle: Use the offline built-in model (downloads automatically the first time)
llmAssist.stopBuiltinTitle: Stop the built-in AI and free memory (restarts automatically on the next generation)
llmAssist.modelsFetchError: Couldn't fetch the model list ({{error}}). Check the Base URL, retry with ↻, or type a name manually.
llmAssist.modelsEmpty: No installed models found. Confirm a model has been pulled to this Ollama and that the Base URL points to the right Ollama, then retry with ↻.

localOnly.toggleTitle: Block sending to cloud providers/endpoints and allow only local targets (Ollama / localhost / LAN)

masterPicker.buttonTitle: Slide master used for this deck
masterPicker.importTitle: Import a .pptx keeping its layouts and placeholders as-is
masterPicker.remakeTitle: Inherit only fonts, colors, and background from a .pptx and rebuild with SlideCraft's layouts
masterPicker.createTitle: Pick colors and fonts to generate a new template
masterPicker.remakeAITitle: AI maps the imported master's layouts onto clean canonical layouts (falls back to the deterministic remake when AI is not connected)
masterPicker.remakeAINotReady: AI not connected — connect a provider first (Assist → provider settings)

masterReg.builtinLoadFailed: Failed to load the built-in template ({{status}})

preview.emptyHint: Type Markdown and the preview appears here

refineProposal.heading: Review refinements
refineProposal.nothingConverged: Everything is already tidy. No changes to apply.
refineProposal.nothingNotConverged: No changes could be fixed automatically (remaining issues need manual / upstream handling).

reviewBar.aiFixTitle: Open AI Assist to fix (prompt preset — review/edit, then generate)
reviewBar.promptTitle: Give this slide a concise title that describes its content.
reviewBar.promptSplit: There is too much information to fit on one slide. Focus on the key points and make each bullet a short key phrase (aim for 28 characters or fewer). Do not omit information.
reviewBar.promptCondense: Summarize each bullet into a short key phrase (aim for 28 characters or fewer). Key points, not sentences. Do not omit information.
reviewBar.promptTidy: Tidy this slide up concisely so it fits within the layout.

slideEditor.resetToAutoTitle: Return to auto-select (always picks the best score)
slideEditor.sizeSliderTitle: Drag to resize (keeps the center fixed)
slideEditor.replaceIntoBodyTitle: Place back into the body frame (front)
slideEditor.makeBackmostTitle: Make it the backmost layer (laid behind without breaking existing content)
slideEditor.fitTitle: contain = whole image with padding / cover = cropped to fill the frame
slideEditor.aspectLockTitle: Keep the aspect ratio when resizing
slideEditor.resetRectTitle: Reset to default size and position (clear manual adjustments)

slides.add: Add a slide (after the selected one)

templateCreator.title: Create Template
templateCreator.aiIntro: ✨ Let AI handle it (describe the mood and purpose to fill the form below with a proposal)
templateCreator.aiPlaceholder: e.g. A calm report for government agencies, green-based
templateCreator.aiProposeTitleReady: Have AI propose colors and fonts
templateCreator.aiProposeTitleNotReady: AI connection is not set up (configure it in the ✨AI dock)
templateCreator.resetPaletteTitle: Reset to the built-in Midnight Executive palette
templateCreator.layoutsHint: Unselected layouts are not included in the template (at least one title placeholder and one body placeholder are required).
templateCreator.customLayoutsHint: You can define and add your own layouts (placeholder positions, roles, and colors). Edits are reflected in the preview instantly.
templateCreator.createTitleRejected: The selected layouts lack a title/body placeholder
templateCreator.createTitleNoLayouts: Select or add at least one layout

toolbar.aiCollabTitle: Co-editing: live-sharing with another AI (click to toggle the AI dock)
